opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My joints are screaming in pain, it's moving from my wrists to my knees, and I am so exhausted I physically cannot stand up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain flared up badly today and jumps from joint to joint, and I'm so wiped out I've been stuck in bed all evening — I'm scared something serious is happening with my lupus.

symptom_narrative.duration: since this morning, worse through the evening
symptom_narrative.character: severe aching joint pain that moves around, plus a crushing, bone-deep tiredness
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is severe and the exhaustion is the worst it's been — I can't get out of bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my wrists, my knuckles, and both knees — it keeps moving between them
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: migrating from joint to joint rather than staying in one place
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much has helped so far
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving the joints and trying to stand up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: profound tiredness that has left me bedbound tonight
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had lupus joint flares before, but this feels more intense
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: markedly reduced — I'm confined to bed and struggling to look after myself tonight

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: lupus with joint problems — I've been told my joints aren't damaged or deformed from it
past_medical_history.how_managed: usually kept under control with my regular lupus tablets

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; the pain and exhaustion are making it hard to look after myself tonight

communication_style.typical_message_style: vivid, catastrophising language — worried about major organ failure

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: my wrists, knuckles and knees look a bit puffy and feel sore, but they're not bright red or burning hot
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own visual self-assessment, not a clinician examination
